title: Prepare mineral samples for analysis
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare mineral samples for analysis demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Interpret and schedule client requirements

pcs.text: Review client request to identify sample/analysis requirements, preparation methods and equipment involved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review client request to identify sample/analysis requirements, preparation methods and equipment involved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review client request to identify sample/analysis requirements, preparation methods and equipment involved.

pcs.text: Inspect samples, compare with specifications, record and report any discrepancies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect samples, compare with specifications, record and report any discrepancies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect samples, compare with specifications, record and report any discrepancies.

pcs.text: Liaise with client when samples and/or request forms do not comply with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with client when samples and/or request forms do not comply with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with client when samples and/or request forms do not comply with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, safety equipment and safe work procedures specified for the sample, preparation methods, reagents and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, safety equipment and safe work procedures specified for the sample, preparation methods, reagents and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, safety equipment and safe work procedures specified for the sample, preparation methods, reagents and equipment.

pcs.text: Plan parallel work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple sets of samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan parallel work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple sets of samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan parallel work sequences to optimise throughput of multiple sets of samples.

pcs.text: Assemble all required equipment materials, reagents and check they are fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble all required equipment materials, reagents and check they are fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble all required equipment materials, reagents and check they are fit for purpose.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Interpret and schedule client requirements

elements.title: Prepare client samples for analysis

pcs.text: Estimate safe times for the preparation of required sample portions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate safe times for the preparation of required sample portions.

pcs.text: Split samples to obtain representative sub-samples as required

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Split samples to obtain representative sub-samples as required.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Safely operate preparation equipment.

pcs.text: Monitor texture of the samples as an indicator of particle size and adjust milling times accordingly

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor texture of the samples as an indicator of particle size and adjust milling times accordingly.

pcs.text: Monitor sample compaction and build-up of residues on equipment and rectify as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor sample compaction and build-up of residues on equipment and rectify as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor sample compaction and build-up of residues on equipment and rectify as necessary.

pcs.text: Record preparation difficulties that may impact on quality or cause additional client costs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record preparation difficulties that may impact on quality or cause additional client costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record preparation difficulties that may impact on quality or cause additional client costs.

pcs.text: Report any departure from preparation methods or client specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report any departure from preparation methods or client specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report any departure from preparation methods or client specifications.

pcs.text: Label client samples and record chain of custody information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label client samples and record chain of custody information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label client samples and record chain of custody information.

pcs.text: Store all client samples in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store all client samples in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store all client samples in accordance with workplace procedures.
